label: negative
source: Public data: USDC on Solana; parameters approximated from CoinGecko / Solana Explorer 2026-04-22

token_meta.note: Freeze authority active (OFAC compliance, Circle-controlled). D01 attenuated by jup_strict. Not relevant for D04.

market_cap.note: USDC market cap $26B >> $60M filter. Detector exits with Info event immediately.

swaps_1h.note: Approximate: USDC has $10B–$20B daily Solana DEX volume. ~$800M in 1h is normal.

baseline_7d.note: Robust multi-billion dollar daily baseline. volume_ratio ≈ 1.28× (0.8B/day_fraction vs 15B daily). Well below 5× threshold if hypothetically evaluated.

price_data.note: Stablecoin peg: price change is noise (~0.02% variation). Well below 30% threshold.

notes: Validates the market_cap_filter path as the primary termination condition for high-cap tokens.
Stablecoin price characteristic (near-zero 1h change) provides an additional safety net: even without the market cap filter, price_change_pct_1h ≈ 0 << 0.30 ensures Signal A cannot fire.
USDC mint authority is active (Circle OFAC compliance). This is the known legitimate freeze-authority use case from D01 design. Not relevant to D04.
is_established_protocol = true (jup_strict=true). If somehow evaluated, Signal C would be suppressed.
